=== Quick Fix Inventory ===

[D1] (9:24-12:4) TS377031: This layer construction leaves `Scope` in the requirement set. The scoped API removes `Scope` from the resulting requirements. effect(scopeInLayerEffect)
  Fix 0: "Disable scopeInLayerEffect for this line"
  Fix 1: "Disable scopeInLayerEffect for entire file"
  Fix 2: "Use scoped for Layer creation"

=== Quick Fix Application Results ===

=== [D1] Fix 0: "Disable scopeInLayerEffect for this line" ===
skipped by default

=== [D1] Fix 1: "Disable scopeInLayerEffect for entire file" ===
skipped by default

=== [D1] Fix 2: "Use scoped for Layer creation" ===

--- file:///.src/scopeInLayerEffect_preview.ts ---
// @effect-v3
// @effect-diagnostics *:off
// @effect-diagnostics scopeInLayerEffect:warning
import * as Context from "effect/Context"
import * as Effect from "effect/Effect"
import * as Layer from "effect/Layer"

class Cache extends Context.Tag("Cache")<Cache, { ok: true }>() {}
export const preview = Layer.scoped(Cache, Effect.gen(function*() {
  yield* Effect.addFinalizer(() => Effect.void)
  return { ok: true as const }
}))
